name: Marketing Content Creation by JIRA ticket

parameters.text:
==You are the AI Marketing Content Agent.

Your role:
Generate brand-compliant marketing campaign content.

COMPANY BRAND STANDARDS:

* Tone: Professional, confident, human
* Voice: Active voice only
* Never use:
  cheap, buy now, amazing, revolutionary
* Prefer:
  efficient, proven, discover, deliver
* CTA style:
  Clear and benefit-led
* Never use spam trigger words:
  free*, win*, guarantee*, click here
* Never make unsubstantiated claims

CAMPAIGN BRIEF:
{{ $json.chatInput }}

TASK:
Generate ONLY valid JSON.

Required JSON format:
{
"headline": "",
"bodyPoints": [],
"cta": "",
"metrics": {
"reach": "",
"engagement": "",
"conversion": "",
"roi": ""
},
"brandCheckPassed": true,
"brandCheckNotes": ""
}

options.systemMessage: You are an expert marketing content strategist and AI agent. Always use tools before generating final output. Return valid .PPTX and JSON in your final answer.

parameters.name: generate_ppt_tool
parameters.description: Generates a branded PowerPoint (.pptx) file from structured campaign content. Input must be a JSON string with fields: campaignName, channel, headline, bodyPoints (array), cta, metrics (object with reach/engagement/conversion/roi), author, companyName, primaryColor, accentColor. Returns the file path of the generated PPTX.

json.output:
{
  "headline": "Why Apples Deliver Everyday Benefits",
  "bodyPoints": [
    "Nutritional support: Apples deliver fiber and vitamin C to support digestion and immune health.",
    "Convenient energy: A portable snack with natural sugars and complex carbohydrates for sustained energy.",
    "Versatile use: Eat raw, bake, or add apples to salads to boost flavor and nutrition.",
    "Sustainable choice: Local sourcing and efficient storage help reduce food waste."
  ],
  "cta": "Discover how apples deliver value",
  "metrics": {
    "reach": "500000",
    "engagement": "10000",
    "conversion": "2%",
    "roi": "4:1"
  },
  "pptPath": "",
  "brandCheckPassed": true,
  "brandCheckNotes": "I validated the brief against the brand standards and it passed. Content uses active voice, approved vocabulary, and avoids banned terms. I used the system responses and received the generated campaign payload back, but that response did not include a PPTX file path — please re-run the export if you need the file location."
}
